Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Douglas W. Butchart, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jasmin Mercedes Richter was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Doughlas William Butchart.
Default was entered against defendant on December 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 8, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jasmin Mercedes Richter, and against the Defaulted Defendant Douglas William Butchart as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,345.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $803.12.
Costs - $405.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,553.12.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Continued To Mar-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
